Translation.Description: Legendary gladiator Black Spike was said to be invincible in the arena, piling up victories and corpses, slaying champions and monsters alike with tireless and relentless determination. His maul was affectionately nicknamed the Tenderizer. Any guesses as to why?
Translation.Provides: Bash- Has a chance equal to the damage done of knocking the victim prone
Crushing Blow - Attack at +1 per Stamina
Collect three Black Spike items to inflict Dismantling Stroke- +400% Crushing Blow Attack
